message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. I do not have a loan record available to verify in this turn, so please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
Yes, the last four digits are 4831. I want to sort this out, but I can only make a small payment now and more after my salary comes in.

Thank you. Your current amount due is 12,921. You can make a small payment now and more after your salary comes in, and you want to sort this out. I’m handing this to the next agent to review available options.

Thanks. I can make a small payment today, but because of a family medical expense and a delayed salary credit, I’d need the balance split after my next salary date if that’s possible.

I’ve noted the family medical expense and delayed salary as a hardship-related reason. Under current Nira policy, any extension beyond 30 days is not allowed. Based on the date already on file, a split with the remaining balance on 2026-05-10 does not fit that window. I also can’t confirm exact approvable reduced-closure terms from the available data in this turn. If you want to keep this in resolution now, the policy-compliant path would be: a payment today and the remaining balance completed within 30 days. Can you complete the balance within that 30-day window?
I can make a small payment today, but I can’t clear the rest within 30 days; if there’s any option to split it within that window at amounts I can manage, I’m willing to discuss it.

A split can only be considered if it completes within 30 days under current Nira policy. I can’t confirm exact approved installment terms from the available data right now, but if you want to keep this in resolution, the policy-compliant path would be your payment today with the remaining balance fully completed within 30 days. What is the latest date within the next 30 days that you could complete the remaining balance?
I can pay a small amount today, but I can’t commit to clearing the rest within 30 days, so if that’s the only option I’m not able to agree to it.

Under current Nira policy, I do not have a compliant arrangement to offer if the balance cannot be completed within 30 days, and I cannot confirm exact approvable reduced-closure terms from the available data. I’ve recorded that you can make a small payment today but cannot agree to a 30-day completion. If an approved option becomes available, that would be the next step.
